verses.text: Ahih hangin a kum sagihna kumin Jehoiada amah kihanthawnin a za-a a ukte, Jehoram' tapa Azariah, leh Jehohanan' tapa Ishmael, leh Obed' tapa Azariah, leh Adaiah' tapa Maaseiah, leh Zikri' tapa Elishafat-te tawh thukimna khat a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah amaute pai kawikawi-in Judah khuapite khempeuh panin Levi mite, leh Israel mi beh lutangte khawmin Jerusalem-ah hong pai uh hi

Tua ciangin a kikhawm khempeuh in Pasian' biakinn sungah kumpipa tapa Joash tawh thuciamna khat bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin Jehoiada in amaute kiangah, “En un, kumpipa' tapa! Topa in David suante tawh kisai-in a gen bangin amah uksak un
Note in hih bangin na hih ding uh hi: Sabbath ni-in nasep a peng no siampite leh Levi mite sung panin seh thumah seh khat kulhkongpi cingte na hi ding uh a
seh thumah seh khat kumpipa' inn-ah omin seh thumah seh khat Khuabul Kulhkongpi-ah na om ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Topa' biakinn tual sungah na om ding uh hi
Siampite leh na a sem Levi mite simloh, Topa' biakinn sungah kuamah lutsak kei un. Amaute a siangtho ahih manin amaute lut thei ding uh a, ahih hangin mi khempeuh in Topa' sawlna na mang ding uh hi

Levi mite in a khutsung uhah a galhiam ciat uh tawh kumpipa cing ding uh a, biakinn sungah a lut peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Hong tum ciang hita leh a pusuah ciang hita lehah kumpipa tawh om un,” a ci hi

Siampi Jehoiada' thupiak khempeuh bangin Levi mite leh Judah mi khempeuh gamta uh hi. Amaute in amau' mi ciat Sabbath ni-in na a sem ding mite tawh Sabbath ni-in nasep a peng ding mite hong paipih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Jehoiada in nasep a peng ding siampite ciahsak lo hi
Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in Topa' biakinn sungah a om, Kumpi David-a' ahi ngei teipite leh lum lian leh lum neute, a ukte tungah a pia hi
Tua ciangin amah in mi khempeuh a galhiam ciat uh tawh kumpipa a cingin, biakinn leitaw lampang pan leilu lampang, biakna tau leh inn kiimah a koih hi

Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa' tapa paikhiatpihin ama lu tungah kumpi lukhu khusak a, kumpi za ngahna lai zong a pia hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi-in amah taangko uh a, Jehoiada leh a tapate in amah sathau nilhin, “Kumpipa khan'sau hen!” a ci uh hi
Mite tai-in kumpipa a phatna uh gamlumna Athaliah in a zak ciangin mite' omna Topa' biakinn-ah a pai hi

Amah a khuadak ciangin, biakinn lutna-a om a khuampi gei-ah kumpipa a ding, leh a ukte leh peengkul tumte kumpipa gei-ah a om, leh gamsung mi khempeuh lungdamin peengkulte a tum, leh lasate a lasakna nate uh tawh tua pawi makai-in a na om uh a mu hi. Tua ciangin Athaliah in a puante balkekin kiko a, “Sawmsimna! Sawmsimna!” a ci hi

Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in galkapte tungah a kikoih a ukte paikhiatpihin amaute tungah, “A gualin a cingte lak panin a pua-ah amah paikhiatpih un. Amah a pan'pih mi khat peuhpeuh namsau tawh kithat ding hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa in, “ Topa' biakinn sungah tuanu that kei un,” ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tuanu man uh a, kumpipa omna inn Sakol Kongpi vangah paikhiatpihin tua lai-ah amah a that uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' mi ahihna ding uh Jehoiada in amah leh mi khempeuh leh kumpipa kikalah thuciamna khat a bawl hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Baal inn-ah pai-in a inn a laikhia uh hi. Amaute in a biakna taute leh a milimte sukham uh a, biakna taute mai-ah Baal siampi Mattan a that uh hi

Tua ciangin Jehoiada in David' hih ngei bangin, Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin lungdamna leh lasakna tawh, Topa' tungah meihal biakna a pia ding, Topa' biakinn a en dingin David in a vaihawmsa Levi siampite leh Levi mite' ukna nuai-ah Topa' biakinn a vil galvilte a koih hi
Lam khat peuhpeuhah a nin mi khat peuhpeuh hong lutlohna dingin Topa' biakinn kulhkongpite-ah amah in kulhkongpi cingte a koih hi

Tua ciangin amah in galkap ukte, mi liante, mi a ukte, leh gamsung mi khempeuh a paipih hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topa' biakinn panin kumpipa' inn kulhkongpi tungnung tawnin kumpipa paipihsuk uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi tokhom tungah kumpipa tusak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin gamsung mi khempeuh lungdam uh hi. Namsau tawh Athaliah a kithah khit ciangin khuapi sung a nuam pah hi.
